request_payload.exposure_text: 🔍 Strategic autonomy isn't just about military tech - it's about protecting our digital lives. As a cybersecurity expert with 15 years in the field, I've seen firsthand how vulnerable our systems are. We can't afford to rely on foreign tech giants for critical infrastructure. Every time we outsource our data security, we're trading long-term safety for short-term convenience. The real cost isn't just economic - it's about our fundamental rights. #DigitalSovereignty #NationalSecurity
